title: Post-Quantum Cryptography
contentHtml:
In this episode Mark talks with guest Jack Richins () and co-host Michael Howard ( ) about post quantum cryptography and the looming Q-Day. Jack and Michael explain what steps Microsoft is taking and what steps customers can take to reduce exposure to this loomig threat. This episode was prompted because Michael has moved from the Microsoft Red Team to the Post Quantum team in Azure Security.

  • NIST SP 800-227 Recommendations for Key-Encapsulation Mechanisms
